required_skills: Doctoral qualification (PhD or equivalent) in the relevant academic discipline
Independent research agenda with a demonstrable record of peer-reviewed publications or working papers
Undergraduate and postgraduate course instruction across core and elective discipline modules
Syllabus and course material development aligned with program learning outcomes
Quantitative or qualitative research methodology and academic writing proficiency
Student academic advising and thesis or dissertation co-supervision
Active participation in departmental committees and institutional service activities
Familiarity with academic grant application processes and research proposal writing
preferred_skills: Postdoctoral research experience or prior academic appointment at a recognized institution
Evidence of externally funded research grants from government bodies, foundations, or industry sponsors
Experience with interdisciplinary or collaborative research projects crossing departmental or institutional boundaries
Proficiency in advanced quantitative tools such as R, STATA, MATLAB, or Python for research purposes
Track record of presenting research at national and international academic conferences
Experience designing and teaching online or hybrid courses using modern LMS platforms
Industry consulting, professional practice, or applied research experience in the discipline
responsibilities: Teach assigned undergraduate and postgraduate courses with full responsibility for syllabus design, content delivery, and assessment, maintaining high instructional quality standards
Develop and sustain an independent research agenda, producing peer-reviewed publications in Scopus or Web of Science indexed journals on a consistent annual basis
Apply for and manage competitive research grants from institutional, national, and international funding agencies to support scholarly activity and lab or project infrastructure
Co-supervise or independently supervise master's dissertations and doctoral research projects, providing structured mentorship and timely academic feedback
Design rigorous and pedagogically sound assessments — including examinations, case studies, research papers, and project-based evaluations — aligned to course learning outcomes
Participate in departmental curriculum review committees, contributing evidence-based recommendations for course updates, new elective design, and program restructuring
Engage with the broader academic community through conference presentations, journal review services, and membership in professional associations within the discipline
Collaborate with senior faculty and interdisciplinary colleagues on joint research projects, grant applications, and externally funded consultancy engagements
Maintain regular student consultation hours, providing academic guidance on course content, career pathways, research opportunities, and graduate study preparation
Contribute to institutional accreditation documentation, program self-study reports, and quality assurance processes as directed by the department head
